economic_notes: Enterprises include Aboriginal Heritage Garden Inc., Eel River Bar Development Corporation Inc., and Osprey Truck Stop. Osprey Truck Stop generates gaming income, card lock rebate, and rent in addition to truck stop sales. Fisheries operations include Snow Crab, Shrimp, AFS, and Other.
notes: 2019 figures are restated. Consolidated statement includes Aboriginal Heritage Garden Inc., Eel River Bar Development Corporation Inc., and Osprey Truck Stop. Osprey Truck Stop had Gaming Net income of $1,277,666 and Card Lock Rebate of $316,867. Section 95 Housing Maintenance had insurance proceeds of $104,177 offset by write-down of tangible capital asset of $112,575. Total government transfers calculated as Federal Operating + Federal Capital + Provincial Operating + Provincial HST = 8268174+493508+692126+1768905. Net financial assets equals net assets per balance sheet at $5,980,586. Schedule of remuneration pages not fully visible in provided images.
